text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a fantastic performance in the Twinkle
Series, Silence Suzuka has had an impressive first
three years.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An important milestone is now behind us. But one
peaceful day...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (Spe looks so serious, hehe.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka has come to see Special Week
race in a scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You have a scrimmage tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yup. And get this, both El and Grass are racing
too.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
There's something I want to tell you, but only if I
can beat those two.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (I wonder what it could be after all this time...)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Well, if it isn't Suzuka. We don't see you here
spectating very often.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh hello, Air Groove. Spe invited me, so... here I
am.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What about you?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I've given instruction to a number of those
participating today, so I've come to see the fruits
of my labor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove's eyes soften as she looks across at
the Umamusume lined up in the starting gates.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That reminds me, it seems like you've gotten
yourself quite the following recently.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Do you think so?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'd be lying if I said I wasn't a little jealous, but... I
understand why.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Running like the wind across the turf, then gaining
even more speed down the final stretch... It's not
something you see every day.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I mentioned before about you being a guiding
light for the younger students, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Truth be told, you were a guiding light for me
too.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Air Groove...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ka-chak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sound of the starting gates opening cuts
through the air.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Umamusume dash out onto the track all at
once.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I do hope you take what I've told you to heart.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I will.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even if it is just a scrimmage, a race is a race.
Everyone gives it everything they have.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week is situated toward the back,
observing the spread of runners before her.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Spe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race continues without a clear leader—then
Special Week begins closing in on the fourth
corner.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Raaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her fighting spirit surges along with her speed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She charges past the other racers, one by one.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, those three are neck and neck!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I won't let you win!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Graaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder, El Condor Pasa, and, finally,
Special Week...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three racers throw themselves towards the
finish line with all their might!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Suzukaaaa!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Spe! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! So, um, about that thing I wanted to
tell you...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'm going to surpass you!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She repeatedly blinks as Special Week makes her
sudden declaration. Air Groove bursts into
laughter.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Special Week, if you're trying to make a
statement, make it properly.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, right! Sorry!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um, so... do you remember the night of the
Mainichi Okan?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That was the night when Special Week's desire to
catch up with Silence Suzuka became a desire to
overtake her.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I've been working so hard ever since then.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But for some reason, I just couldn't work up the
confidence to tell you.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Somewhere in my heart, I was doubting that I
could really do it.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You know, I've always thought both El and Grass
were amazing runners.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But I can't just sit back always thinking about how
amazing everyone is.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And that goes double if I want to be better than
you, Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That seems to be what fueled the impressive
performance we witnessed in the scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I see... So that's what you wanted to tell me.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I was finally able to compete with El and Grass.
That's why, now, I can say this confidently.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I will surpass you, Suzuka! Just wait until we meet
on the track!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: All right... You're on!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It looks like you've got yourself a new rival,
Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It seems so. I guess there are still more challenges
coming my way.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Spe. But all the same, I have no plans
to give up the lead.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I understand, but I'm coming for it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later, at night...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's off in her own world, so I try to get her
attention.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh... Hello, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
No, it's nothing. I just... felt like looking out at
the grounds.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Spe told me today that she wants to be my rival.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, yeah. I'm really happy about it. It feels like
the beginning of something new.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
And I'm sure there's something new waiting after I
compete with her too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her eyes glitter with anticipation as she stares out
across the dark field.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: So many things have happened since I came here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's been about three years since I met Silence
Suzuka... I can't say that every day went the way I
expected it to.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I know I'm not always going to achieve success in
the future.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I may find myself lost every now and again...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But as long as you're with me, I know I'll be okay.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Just like I've been all this time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She smiles warmly.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking forward to the challenges ahead,
Trainer.
